title: Musk Announces Grok 4.5 Available on All Platforms: Faster, Cheaper, and More Productive Than Fable
excerpt: Musk once again personally announced the new product on the social platform: Grok 4.5 is now available on all platforms.He clearly defined the positioning of th
content_html:
Musk once again personally announced the new product on the social platform: Grok 4.5 is now available on all platforms.

He clearly defined the positioning of this new model — although it is not as good as Fable, it is very fast, cost-effective, and can get the job done. In one sentence, Musk neither concealed the gap between Grok 4.5 and the top performers, nor did he hide its selling points, emphasizing practicality: it may not be the smartest, but it is the fastest, most cost-effective, and most capable of getting things done.

Given the current emphasis on computing power costs, labeling "getting the job done" as the core feature seems to be a direct call to action for enterprise-level and daily high-frequency scenarios.

sentences.zh: 马斯克再次亲自在社交平台上宣布了新产品：Grok 4.5现已在全平台上线。

In one sentence, Musk neither concealed the gap between Grok 4.5 and the top performers, nor did he hide its selling points, emphasizing practicality: it may not be the smartest, but it is the fastest, most cost-effective, and most capable of getting things done.

sentences.zh: 他明确了这个新模式的定位——虽然不如《神鬼寓言》，但速度很快，性价比高，能完成工作。

sentences.en: In one sentence, Musk neither concealed the gap between Grok 4.5 and the top performers, nor did he hide its selling points, emphasizing practicality: it may not be the smartest, but it is the fastest, most cost-effective, and most capable of getting things done.
sentences.zh: 马斯克一句话，既没有隐瞒Grok 4.5与顶级产品的差距，也没有隐瞒它的卖点，强调实用性：它可能不是最聪明的，但它是最快、最具性价比、最能把事情做好的。

sentences.zh: 鉴于当前对算力成本的重视，将“完成工作”标记为核心特征似乎是对企业级和日常高频场景的直接号召。

content_html_zh:
马斯克再次亲自在社交平台上宣布了新产品：Grok 4.5现已在全平台上线。

他明确了这个新模式的定位——虽然不如《神鬼寓言》，但速度很快，性价比高，能完成工作。 马斯克一句话，既没有隐瞒Grok 4.5与顶级产品的差距，也没有隐瞒它的卖点，强调实用性：它可能不是最聪明的，但它是最快、最具性价比、最能把事情做好的。

鉴于当前对算力成本的重视，将“完成工作”标记为核心特征似乎是对企业级和日常高频场景的直接号召。
